summary: Frontend-only testing of responsive navigation text overlap fix. ALL TESTS PASSED. At 1366px width: nav shows icon-only buttons with NO text overlap (192px gap between Settings and Language selector). At 1920px width: all nav labels visible (Dashboard, Operasyon, Rezervasyon, Finans, Kanallar, Raporlar, Gelismis, Altyapi, Settings). Dropdown menus work correctly. Active state highlighting works. Page content fills viewport properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive breakpoint correctly implemented using Tailwind 2xl (1536px) - 'hidden 2xl:inline' class on nav text labels
Settings icon and Language selector have proper spacing (192px gap at 1366px, 301px gap at 1920px)
scrollbar-none utility class added to App.css for clean horizontal nav scrolling
TooltipContent shows nav labels on hover when text is hidden (useful at < 1536px widths)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive navigation fix verified. Nav labels show at 2xl breakpoint (1536px+), icons only below. Key files: Layout.js uses 'hidden 2xl:inline' for text labels. No overlap between Settings and Language selector at any tested width (1024px, 1366px, 1920px).

tests.details: Dashboard and Settings show icons only (no text visible)
Gap of 192px between Settings button and Language selector - no overlap
Operations dropdown opens with 8 items (Calendar, PMS, PMS Operations, etc.)

tests.test: All nav text labels visible at 1920px
tests.details: All 9 labels visible: Dashboard, Operasyon, Rezervasyon, Finans, Kanallar, Raporlar, Gelismis, Altyapi, Settings
Gap of 301px between Settings and Language selector
Dashboard button shows bg-blue-600 active state
Clicking group icon opens dropdown with sub-items
Finance group shows blue highlight when on finance page
Main content uses flex-1, fills available space below header
